name: Fizeau Harness Intelligence

invalid_run_handling.note: invalid runs are excluded from numerator and denominator; report invalid class counts separately

coverage_notes: Benchmark-specific deltas are allowed on a single benchmark when the compared rows pin the same benchmark, scorer, subset, denominator policy, and evidence window.
Cross-benchmark rankings require the formula benchmark set to be present on both subjects.
If any required benchmark is missing, the generator must refuse the comparison or apply an explicit confidence penalty.
confidence_notes: TerminalBench is the primary harness signal.
HumanEval is a low-cost anchor that must not dominate the total.
exclusion_rules: refuse comparisons when formula version, evidence window, benchmark coverage, scorer, or denominator rules differ
exclude invalid runs from numerator and denominator while retaining invalid-class counts
do not blend benchmark-specific deltas with cross-benchmark FHI rankings
